## Summary

Describe the change clearly.

## Why

Explain why this change is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] Documentation reviewed
- [ ] Scripts tested locally, if applicable
- [ ] Examples reviewed, if applicable
- [ ] No secrets or credentials added

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is limited to one logical change
- [ ] Related documentation was updated
- [ ] Risky behavior or breaking impact is called out

## Notes For Reviewers

Add anything maintainers should verify during review.
